private_invitation_preference_desc.en: Control whether others can send you private invites.

dine_credits_use_hint.en: Used for private & date invites, AI, and boosts. Free pool is used first.

confirm_delete_all_private.en: Are you sure you want to delete all your private invitations?

guest_profile_desc.en: Create an account to customize your profile and join events.

social_invite_claim_failed.en: Could not open this invitation. Try again.

social_invite_link_invalid.en: This invitation link is invalid or has expired.

social_invite_viewing_now.en: You are viewing a private invitation

social_invite_landing_subtitle_named.en: Join DineBuddies free to accept or decline {{host}}\

social_invite_landing_subtitle.en: Join DineBuddies free to accept or decline — it only takes a few seconds.

failed_delete_account.en: Failed to delete account. Please try again.

install_ios_desc.en: Tap Share → Add to Home Screen

security_confirm_deletion.en: For your security, please enter your password to confirm account deletion.

confirm_delete_invitation.en: Are you sure you want to delete this invitation?

social_invitation_access_denied.en: You do not have access to this invitation.

social_invitation_not_published.en: This invitation has not been sent yet.

social_invitation_blocked_host.en: You cannot view invitations from this person.

social_invitation_draft_banner.en: This invitation is still a draft — guests have not been notified yet. Open preview to review and send.

social_preview_leave_question.en: Save your invitation draft before leaving preview?

social_draft_permission_denied.en: Could not open the draft. Sign in again and retry.

error_loading_draft.en: Could not load the invitation draft.

consumer_no_plans.en: Your Dine Credits pay for private invites, date invites, AI, and boosts — one balance (free + paid; free is used first). Partners use the same credit model from their wallet. Final per-use prices may be tuned later.

block_user_confirm.en: Block this user? You will no longer see their profile, posts, or invitations.

user_blocked_stay_on_page_toast.en: User blocked. You can keep viewing this page until you leave.

block_grace_banner.en: This person is blocked. You can keep viewing this page; the simplified blocked view will show when you open their profile again.

user_directory_subtitle.en: Discover members, send private invites, or send a gift.

verify_email_resent.en: Verification email sent. Check your inbox.

verify_email_still_pending.en: Not verified yet. Open the link in the email we sent.

verify_email_check_failed.en: Could not refresh status. Try again.

verify_email_subtitle.en: We sent a verification link to:

verify_email_hint.en: Open the email and tap “Verify Account”. Then return here and tap “I’ve verified”.

verify_email_wrong_account.en: Sign out and use another email

ai_design_studio_prompt_placeholder.en: e.g. warm sunset beach scene, earthy tones, no text…
